_comment: Root MCP server config. Servers here are loaded automatically by Claude Code when running in this repo. Uncomment entries below to enable them. Global MCP servers live in ~/.claude/mcp.json; keep this file scoped to this repo.

agent-state._note: Read-only MCP over ~/.claude/agent_state.duckdb. Enable by copying this block into mcpServers below. Provided by apps/agent-state-mcp/.
